$comment: Dedicated config for the Consolidation-Pass — separate from scripts/resolver-pass.config.json (which is per-wave state, generated by the resolver-loop detector). The Consolidation-Pass operates on the cumulative W40K range (1..57); it must NOT be tied to whichever wave the resolver-loop is on, so it gets its own config that survives subsequent resolver passes.

aggregator.$comment: Re-Apply range. The Consolidation-Pass mutates the reference layer; the Re-Apply re-derives every junction over the cumulative range from the now-deduped reference layer (idempotent delete-then-insert per junction).
